DISCOVERY, 302, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. EMAIL DATED 1/16/24.

DEFENDANTS SEPARATE STATEMENT IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET TWO); REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT COBLENTZ, MARGARET MILLER, GEOFFREY

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS GEOFFREY MILLER AND MARGRET COBLENTZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFFS GEORGINA RUSSELL AND MUTSUVU INAYAMA TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET TWO) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFFS GEORGINA RUSSELL AND MASTSUBU SHALL EACH SERVE DEFENDANTS WITH VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 3, 6, 10 & 14. (2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF SEVEN HUNDRED, FORTY-FOUR DOLLARS AND SEVENTY-SIX CENTS ($744.76) PAYABLE WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEYS. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM (CRC 3.1312) AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM) JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Special Interrogatories (Set Two); Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Joseph E. Tomasik, Esq., LAW OFFICE OF JOSEPH E. TOMASIK (510) 848-0500 Jet@lawjt.com Attorney for Plaintiffs, GEORGINA RUSSELL and MUTSUBU INAYAMA
MICHAEL J. DALEY, ESQ. JEANETTE N. LITTLE & ASSOCIATES Employees of the Law Department State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company (925) 225-6838 mike.daley@statefarm.com Attorney for Defendants Geoffrey Miller and Margaret Coblentz

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARGARET COBLENTZ, GEOFFREY MILLER'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Defendants Special Interrogatories (Set Two); Request For Monetary Sanctions

DEFENDANTS GEOFFREY MILLER AND MARGRET COBLENTZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM PLAINTIFFS GEORGINA RUSSELL AND MUTSUVU INAYAMA TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET TWO) AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY IT WILL BE GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFFS GEORGINA RUSSELL AND MASTSUBU SHALL EACH SERVE DEFENDANTS WITH VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS 3, 6, 10 & 14.

(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFFS IN THE AMOUNT OF SEVEN HUNDRED, FORTY-FOUR DOLLARS AND SEVENTY-SIX CENTS ($744.76) PAYABLE WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER TO DEFENDANTS AND THEIR ATTORNEYS.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM (CRC 3.1312) AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
